channel.title: Light Roast on Barista At Home
channel.description: Recent content in Light Roast on Barista At Home

item.title: What Is Blonde Espresso? Light Roast Espresso Explained
item.description: Blonde espresso is a light roast espresso with a naturally sweeter, fruitier flavor and slightly more caffeine than dark roast espresso. Here's what makes it different and how to make it at home.
